mapper.select: SELECT c.name AS cinemaName, NULL AS hallName, SUM(o.total_amount) AS totalAmount, COUNT(o.id) AS orderCount, 0.0 AS percentage FROM cinema_order o INNER JOIN seat_schedule ss ON o.schedule_id = ss.schedule_id INNER JOIN hall h ON ss.hall_id = h.id INNER JOIN cinema c ON h.cinema_id = c.id WHERE o.create_time >= #{startDate} AND o.create_time < #{endDate} AND o.status IN ('PAID', 'USED') GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
